name: applescript-bb-mcp-server
description: MCP server that enables LLM clients to interact with macOS applications through AppleScript. Built using the @beyondbetter/bb-mcp-server library, this server provides safe, controlled execution of predefined scripts with optional support for arbitrary script execution.
